info.description: API for managing public demo sandboxes and internal employee sandboxes.
info.title: Shopshredder Sandbox API

get.description: Returns recent audit log entries, optionally limited

post.description: Authenticate with email and password, receive a JWT token
Create a new user account with email and password

get.description: Returns all images including private ones

post.description: Register a new Docker image. If not available locally, a background pull is started.

get.description: Returns all images currently being pulled, with progress percentage
SSE endpoint streaming pull progress events. Each event is JSON with "percent" (int) and "status" (string) fields.

post.description: Upload or replace the thumbnail for an image

delete.description: Remove the thumbnail associated with an image

get.description: Returns sandboxes owned by the authenticated user

post.description: Spin up a new sandbox for a guest visitor

get.description: Returns all images marked as public
Returns sandboxes for the current guest session (cookie-based)

delete.description: Stop and remove a guest session's sandbox

get.description: Returns all sandboxes that are currently active (admin view)

post.description: Spin up a new sandbox for an authenticated user

get.description: Returns a single sandbox by its UUID

delete.description: Stop and remove an authenticated user's sandbox

get.description: SSE endpoint streaming sandbox readiness for active subscribers.

post.description: Commit the current state of a running sandbox as a new Docker image
post.summary: Create a snapshot image from a sandbox

patch.description: Add additional time to a sandbox's expiration

description.example: Base image for internal sales demos.
Base image for internal sales demos.
Prepared image for sales demos and internal QA.

BearerAuth.description: Paste the JWT token. "Bearer " is optional.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
